scripts.dev:storybook: pnpm --filter @meetpaul/tokens build && concurrently "pnpm --filter paul dev" "pnpm --filter paul-storybook-vue dev" "pnpm --filter paul-storybook-svelte dev" "pnpm --filter paul-storybook-angular dev"
scripts.build:storybook: pnpm --filter @meetpaul/tokens build && pnpm --filter paul build && pnpm --filter paul-storybook-vue build && pnpm --filter paul-storybook-svelte build && pnpm --filter paul-storybook-angular build
